title: Skill Graph Program: IM3 Module 1 Pilot
description: Prove the full graph-to-runtime path on Integrated Math 3 Module 1 before broad rollout: source extraction, standards, edges, blueprints, generators, React rendering, practice.v1 submissions, and teacher evidence.
deviation_notes: Phases 1-3 and 4-6 were combined into fewer commits than planned. No functional deviations from spec.
